feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Emergence of the Partial Trace from Classical Probability Theory
entry.content:
Authors: AM Ortiz, FJF Peláez, J Capmany -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.24290, 2026

Abstract: The partial trace is commonly introduced in quantum mechanics as an algebraic operation used to define reduced states of composite systems. However, the probabilistic origin of this operation goes systematically unnoticed in the literature ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)
